archetype_reasoning: This trader has extraordinary accuracy in Russia_UKR (93.9%, 1008 wins) and solid performance in Trump_US (89.6%, 328 wins), but catastrophically fails outside these two domains with only 9.2% accuracy in 'Other' (45 wins, 442 losses). The extreme divergence between in-domain and out-of-domain performance is the defining signature of a domain specialist. High directionality (0.91) confirms consistent directional conviction rather than LP or hedging behavior.
domain_blindspots: Other: catastrophically poor accuracy at 9.2% across 487 trades — worse than random, suggesting systematic misjudgment outside core domains
domain_summary: This trader has a genuine and extraordinary edge in Russia-Ukraine and Trump/US political markets, likely reflecting deep situational awareness or information advantages in these areas. Outside these two domains, their performance is so poor it actively destroys value — signals in 'Other' markets should be faded rather than followed.
signal_weight_reasoning: Russia_UKR and Trump_US signals from this trader carry FULL weight given elite-level accuracy across very large sample sizes (1000+ and 300+ trades respectively). However, the 'Other' domain performance (9.2%) is not merely noise — it is reliably wrong — making EXCLUDE the appropriate weight for non-core signals. DOMAIN_ONLY captures this asymmetry.
discounted_domains: Other — signals here should be treated as contrarian indicators given sub-10% accuracy
behavioural_flags: Extreme domain concentration: 97%+ of winning trades come from just two domains
Recent batch of 15 consecutive losses on Harris dropout market suggests doubling-down behavior on a losing thesis
Very few distinct geo markets (5) despite 1927 resolved trades — extreme repetition within narrow themes
High directionality (0.91) indicates strong conviction trading rather than hedging
No open positions at time of profiling — possible strategic pause after Harris market losses
risk_patterns: Severe concentration risk: portfolio dependent on Russia_UKR and Trump_US outcomes
Sunk-cost doubling-down evident in Harris market: 15 repeat NO trades averaging ~0.69 entry, all lost
Out-of-domain overconfidence: 442 losses in 'Other' suggests persistent failure to recognize edge boundaries
The 'Other' domain destruction (487 trades, 9.2% accuracy) likely represents significant capital destruction offsetting core-domain gains

notable_calls.significance: 1008 wins in Russia_UKR at 93.9% accuracy is statistically extraordinary and implies genuine informational or analytical edge in this domain

notable_calls.market: Will Harris drop out of 2025 race before September?
notable_calls.significance: 15 consecutive losses on same market averaging ~0.69 entry price — classic doubling-down on a losing thesis; Harris apparently did drop out before September, exposing domain overreach

open_positions_summary: No open positions. The trader appears to have gone dormant or is in a strategic pause, possibly following the significant string of losses on the Harris dropout market.
watch_items: Monitor for re-entry into Russia_UKR markets — this is where the trader's alpha is concentrated
Watch for continued out-of-domain trades in 'Other' markets which historically destroy value
Track whether Harris market losses represent a one-off error or the beginning of deteriorating Trump_US accuracy
Monitor geo_elo_active decay if inactivity continues — currently LEGENDARY but recency-dependent
Watch for any new market entries to assess whether the trader has recalibrated after recent losses
summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier trader with a genuinely extraordinary and statistically robust edge in Russia-Ukraine and Trump/US markets, backed by over 1300 combined wins at near-95% and near-90% accuracy respectively. However, this trader is profoundly dangerous to follow outside their core domains, with 'Other' market accuracy of 9.2% across 487 trades representing one of the clearest domain-blindspot profiles in the dataset. The recent Harris dropout market debacle — 15 consecutive losses averaging 0.69 entry — illustrates classic sunk-cost doubling-down when a thesis fails. Follow unconditionally in Russia_UKR and Trump_US; treat as a contrarian indicator everywhere else.
